texto: It [advanced technology] had isolated the people of the old world from nature, shielding them from the consequences of imbalance, and yet they’d believed, right up until the very end, that it would save them. But…advances in technology could never compensate for failures in empathy.
explicacao: Citação de Ambelin Kwaymullina sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “It [advanced technology] had isolated the people of the old world from nature, shielding them fro…” articula reflexao, nature, technology em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e technology.
